caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid black background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She wears a light green, long-sleeved top featuring small floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. Throughout the sequence, she is captured from the chest up, maintaining a consistent position while her mouth moves in speech. Her hands are raised in front of her chest, shifting slightly in position to emphasize her words, moving from a more open gesture to a tighter, more focused movement. In the bottom left corner of each frame, a small logo is visible consisting of a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL". The lighting is consistent across the scene, focused on the woman, with no other people, objects, or equipment visible in the frame.
